introPage.title: JOMAP
introPage.p1: JOMAP is a smart Jordanian app that combines interactive maps with social media platforms in one place, allowing users to explore nearby places, locations, and activities in an easy and enjoyable way, with the ability to share their experiences and interact with others.
introPage.p2: The app aims to encourage Jordanians to discover different regions of the Kingdom and document tourist, entertainment, and service places, contributing to creating a comprehensive digital guide for places in Jordan based on user content and experiences.
introPage.p3: It also supports local business owners and projects by providing special features that help them promote their businesses and reach a larger number of customers, boosting local economic activity and creating a platform that connects users and business owners in an innovative way.
introPage.dualText: JoMap was designed as an integrated platform serving two main user groups simultaneously: Regular User and Business Owner. It provides customized interfaces and tools to meet the needs of each group with high precision.

exploreLocations.title: Explore Locations
exploreLocations.text: Easily explore all locations and places across Jordan's various governorates.

discoverEvents.title: Discover Events
discoverEvents.text: Discover new activities and events near the user's location.

latestOffers.title: Latest Offers
latestOffers.text: Follow the latest offers, discounts, and local events.

ratings.title: Ratings & Reviews
ratings.text: Share ratings and reviews about visited places to help others.

moments.title: Capture Moments
moments.text: Document the best moments and experiences and share them with the community.

community.title: Interaction & Community
community.text: Create posts and stories, and interact with friends and other users.

featured.title: Featured Places
featured.text: Browse featured activities and places across the Kingdom.

nashmiAI.title: Smart Assistant "Nashmi AI"
nashmiAI.text: Benefit from the smart assistant "Nashmi AI" that suggests new and unique places to discover daily.

businessSupport.title: Business Owner Support
businessSupport.text: Support business owners by providing a dedicated page to promote their businesses and reach new customers.

landmarks.title: Documenting Jordanian Landmarks
landmarks.text: Contribute to documenting Jordanian landmarks and places, creating a community database that reflects the beauty and diversity of Jordan.

introPage.ownerFeaturesTitle: How Does JoMap Support Business Owners?

businessEnv.title: Dedicated Business Environment
businessEnv.text: A completely separate notification screen for business owners to avoid distractions, with account verification to give users confidence that the place is trustworthy.

dynamicOffers.title: Dynamic & Instant Offers
dynamicOffers.text: Create offers with precise geographic targeting that appear instantly to nearby users, with attractive designs to directly attract customers.

eventManagement.title: Activity & Event Management
eventManagement.text: Organize and promote activities, pin them geographically on the interactive map, encouraging organic interaction and user sharing of events.

communityGrowth.title: Community-Driven Growth
communityGrowth.text: Turn every visitor into an influencer through their own posts at the business location, and measure popularity through the "Favorites" system to analyze market preferences.

aiSupport.title: AI for Business Support
aiSupport.text: Provide user recommendations to visit your business based on their behavior, and offer data-driven future insights to measure your campaign success.

solutionsPage.title: Technical Solutions
solutionsPage.subtitle: Complex Problems We Faced and How We Solved Them

notifications.problem: Problem: Notification Congestion Between User Types
notifications.problemText: How can we deliver social notifications to regular users and business notifications (ratings, offers) to owners without overlap or disturbance?
notifications.solutionText: Building completely separate screens and databases (OwnerNotificationScreen). Notifications are routed based on user role (Role) and each notification is linked to a deep link that takes the user to the required action immediately.

mapPerformance.problem: Problem: Map Performance with Many Locations and Offers
mapPerformance.problemText: Loading thousands of markers on the map at once causes severe lag on the phone interface and battery consumption.
mapPerformance.solutionText: Using Marker Clustering technology to group nearby locations into a single expandable icon when zooming, while fetching data based on current screen coordinates only (Bounding Box) through Spring Boot.

imageSpeed.problem: Problem: Image Loading Speed for Places and Users
imageSpeed.problemText: Loading high-resolution images for hundreds of places and reviews consumes user data and increases waiting time.
imageSpeed.solution: Solution: Optimized Cloud Storage (Firebase Storage & Caching)
imageSpeed.solutionText: Using Firebase Storage for image uploads, relying on caching libraries in Jetpack Compose like Coil to ensure images are loaded only once and saved locally, with image compression before uploading from the backend.

eyad.name: Eyad Abu Fares

abd.name: Abdulqader Frokh

techPage.title: Technologies Used
techPage.frontendDesc: React JS is used to build the user interface with fast navigation, reusable components, and a modern interactive design.
techPage.backendDesc: Spring Boot provides REST APIs, authentication, business logic, database connection, and email sending service.
techPage.databaseDesc: The system stores user data, places, ratings, favorites, reports, and owner location data.
techPage.FullStackDesc: The team worked on both frontend and backend development, ensuring seamless
